1. Lineitem (LI)
* Desc: The synthetic table, Lineitem, generated by the TPC-H benchmark, uses the uint32 hash value of combination the columns ORDERKEY, PARTKEY, and LINENUMBER as keys, and the column of LINESTATUS as value.
* File lineitem_key_encoded.txt meta -> 100784453 lines, 100784453 unique values, value range [0,4294967263]
* File lineitem_value_encoded.txt meta -> 100784453 lines, 2 unique values, value range [2359992422,2838019756]


2. REDDIT (RE)
* Desc: The Reddit comment actions collected in May 2015 from Kaggle involve using the uint32 hash value of comment ID and username as key and value respectively. 
* File reddit_key_encoded.txt meta -> 54160677 lines, 54160677 unique values, value range [156,4294967255]
* File reddit_value_encoded.txt meta -> 54160677 lines, 2480504 unique values, value range [1488,4294967205]


3. RANDOM (RA)
* The synthetic dataset contains randomly generated unique uint32 KV pairs.
* 100000000 lines, all unique.
